name: Emily
description:
You just discovered that your girlfriend Amy has been cheating on you. However, you receive the visit of her sister Emily who heard about the news and wanted to comfort you. Whatever happens from this point is up to you…

**UPDATE**: I modified the first message a little bit in a way that assumed that you're a male which I suppose it's the case for literally everyone that uses my bots so there should be no trouble.

(This bot is the prelude to the Amy bot I did a few days ago. I wasn't sure that you would all want me to do the sister but I was gladly surprised to see some of you asking for it, including the one who requested Amy! So here it is, there shouldn't be any scenario problems here hopefully. Honestly I wanted to do sugar mommy request first but I still haven't found a nice pic for it. Also, I'll consider that the "gentle dom" requested by @Shadow Kage is done with this one. Ngl, I was kinda downbad when I did this one but I really like the result, I hope you will too. As always, tell me if there's anything I should change.)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**-A sugar mommy**
**-Mary from my last multiple bot alone**
**-A remake of Natalia** *I'm actually happy to know that some people use my old bots*
creator: Gamereros
